text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's dusk, and Kitasan Black and I have just
finished helping out the neighborhood
association. We're strolling around town when...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Look at all those people over there... Do you
think they're holding a festival or something?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whoa, a raffle! I love testing my luck with these!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wait... We don't have any tickets since we didn't
do any shopping...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Oho, hey there, Kita! Thanks for pitchin' in with
the association again today.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Tell you what. Here's a ticket, on the house. Go
and have a spin.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Really?! Yay! Did you hear that, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I guess one good turn does deserve
another.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer! Let's spin this with all we've got!
Heave ho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black and I take hold of the level and
give it a good spin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
YEEES! We did it, Trainer! We got the grand
prize!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
A hot spring vacation! It'll be like an
all-you-can-eat-and-relax fest!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but... We can't accept this... It wouldn't be
fair for everyone else since we won this with a
free ticket.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
What're you two talkin' about? Have you any idea
how much the neighborhood association owes
you, Kita?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
And here you are, pullin' the grand prize! We're
thrilled you got it! Go and have fun, y'hear?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Well... if you insist! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's do as he says and accept the
coupon. It'd be rude to refuse such kindness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we humbly accept the vacation coupon.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's not like we can start packing our bags
right away. I mean, this year is just so important...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Not just for me, but for Dia, too. I can't be
goofing off during such a critical time.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Maybe after I've kept my promise with Dia and I
feel like it's okay to use it to treat myself...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Then maybe we can use it. What do you think,
Trainer?
choice_data_list: Sounds like a plan! We'll have to work hard!
Sounds like a plan! We'll have to work hard!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
For sure! I'm going to make this year one for the
history books! And once I do...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna soak all my troubles away in the hot
spring! I'll hum my dad's best hits in the tub!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A relaxing soak is waiting for us on the other side
of victory. Kitasan Black is bursting with joy and
determination to claim that vacation!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Talk about an indulgent side dish!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's huge, too! We probably won't even need a
pot for this, huh, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Uh... Why would we need a pot at all?
Uh... Why would we need a pot at all?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was just thinking, it's so big, we could
share it with people family-style, just like you do
with hot pot!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Nothing beats eating together! I always eat
together with my dad's apprentices when I'm back
home!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Since this steak is so big, why don't
we invite people over to eat it with us? Like Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Kita! This steak is huge! Did a bunch of
carrots rain from the sky for you to make this or
something?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Of course not. Anyway, come on! Let's dig
in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of us descend on the mammoth of a
hamburger steak and have a great time!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! Are you sure I can have all of these?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
This is a lot of carrots... This reminds me of the
soup kitchen...
choice_data_list: Oh, I didn't know you volunteered there.
Oh, I didn't know you volunteered there.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I do! I go there to help all the time!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's always so nice to see people smiling and
warming themselves up by the huge pot of stew
on snowy days.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Their smiles will stay with me forever. Seeing them
always makes me glad I went to help out.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Gah! There's no time to waste. Everyone is waiting
for these carrots!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Trainer! Let's hurry! There are hungry
mouths to feed!
choice_data_list: Hold on! We're not on volunteer duty right now!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, oops! Sorry, force of habit...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's take these back with us, then. We
should share them with the others since we have
so many!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we get back, Kitasan Black makes carrot
stew and shares it with everyone. They all
thoroughly enjoy the nutritious meal.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Just one carrot, huh? That's kind of a
letdown...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sorry for the anticlimactic finish, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thanks. I guess I didn't put enough spirit into it.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hang on! I can hold a concert using this carrot as
a microphone!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll sing something special that I don't usually do
in my winning concerts, like an enka song!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
A single caaarrot! ♪ Hidden in the depths my
sleeeve!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A truly inexplicable carrot-themed enka song
echoes into the evening sky. We eat the carrot as
a side dish at dinner afterward.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Aw, rats... Just tissues. I'm sorry, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Things usually don't end up great when I act on
impulse...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
What should I have done differently? Maybe I
should've spun the lever more gently...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe, instead of that, I should've spun it fast
enough to make the handle snap right off!
choice_data_list:
I feel like it's better to get tissues than to break
the poor machine...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Weeell... I guess you have a point... But really?
Just tissues?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's shoulders slump in disappointment
over the lackluster result...
